Headline: #112Vincennes/111th buses Temporary Reroute near 95th/Eggleston
ShortDescription: 112Vincennes/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 95th/Eggleston.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#112Vincennes/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 95th/Eggleston.

Northbound #112 Vincennes/111th buses will operate via 95th, Halsted, 87th, Lafayette, 95th into terminal.

Southbound #112 95th buses will operate via 95th, State, 87th, Halsted, and 95th over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #18 16th/18th Temporary Reroute at 16th/Kedzie
ShortDescription: 18 16th/18th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via due to street blockage near 16th/Kedzie

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#18 16th/18th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via due to street blockage near 16th/Kedzie

Eastbound buses will operate via 16th, Kedzie, Ogden,16th and over normal route

Westbound buses will operate via Ogden, Kedzie,16th and over normal route

Allow extra travel time.
